title: Opening for Software Engineer at SigTuple South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at SigTuple South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the SigTuple South Asia Partners family as a Software Engineer in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
